'''Viraxo''' was the name of a powerful trading family, owners of [[Viraxo Industries]]. The patriarch of the family was [[K'Armyn Viraxo]]. The Viraxo had a long-running feud with the rival [[Azzameen family]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
